name: Makapu'u Beach
tagline: A natural amphitheater channeling perfect shore break — bodyboard legends cut their teeth here.
bestTime: Oct–Apr for best east swell; mornings for lighter wind
insiderTips: NOT for beginners — powerful shore break causes more spinal injuries than any beach on Oahu. Watch from the sand first to gauge conditions. Bring fins (no board rental here). Combine with the Makapu'u Lighthouse Trail right next door for a hike + bodyboard day.
